name: tvt-sales-skills
description: Tavant's AI toolkit for the fintech sales team. Tells you who to call this week (confidence-scored shortlists from your own pipeline data), does the account research homework (9-skill intel chain with a mandatory fact-check gate), helps you build the POV, deck, and proposal, and keeps an honest scorecard of how deals are really going. AI drafts, you send — nothing goes out without you. 38 tvt-* skills, including the tvt-sales-engine router, tvt-sales-pov synthesis, tvt-sales-prospect scorer, and governance (tvt-gov-guard/attest), with Tavant playbooks, accelerators, and the branded deck template bundled.
